title: Stream Accounts

twitchApps.heading: Twitch Apps
twitchApps.empty: No Twitch apps registered. Click Register App to walk through setup at dev.twitch.tv.

accounts.heading: Accounts
accounts.emptyNoApp: Register a Twitch app first, then click + Twitch.
accounts.emptyHasApp: No accounts connected yet. Click + Twitch to authenticate, or + StreamElements to paste a JWT.
accounts.defaultTitle: Default account — overlive nodes with no account picked fall back to this one

footer: Credentials are stored locally in your project database.

alerts.popupBlocked: Could not open OAuth popup — please disable your popup blocker for this site.
alerts.noAppCredential: This account has no app credential — recreate it from scratch.
alerts.removeAppInUse: {{n}} account(s) reference this app — they'll keep working until tokens expire, then will need a new app to reconnect.

registerApp.title: Register Twitch App
registerApp.copyEmpty: That project has no Twitch apps to copy.

help.streamAccounts: Stream accounts are the source for Twitch and StreamElements triggers. Connect an account here to use it in your Logic automations.
